title: Multi-Factor Authentication Setup Wizard

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: Multi-Factor Authentication Setup Wizard

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'>
  <rect x='0' y='0' width='400' height='300' fill='#090a0f'/>
  <rect x='20' y='20' width='360' height='260' fill='#B7D7CD' rx='10'/>
  <text x='25' y='30' font-size='24' fill='#C06C88'>Setup MFA</text>
  <text x='25' y='100' font-size='18' fill='#411C56'>Step 1: Authentication Methods</text>
  <g transform='translate(50, 150)'>
    <circle cx='10' r='5' fill='#B7D7CD' opacity='0.5'/>
    <text x='15' y='-5' font-size='14' fill='#C06C88'>SMS</text>
  </g>
  <g transform='translate(120, 150)'>
    <rect x='0' y='0' width='10' height='10' fill='#B7D7CD' opacity='0.5'/>
    <text x='15' y='0' font-size='14' fill='#C06C88'>Email</text>
  </g>
  <g transform='translate(220, 150)'>
    <rect x='0' y='0' width='10' height='10' fill='#B7D7CD' opacity='0.5'/>
    <text x='15' y='0' font-size='14' fill='#C06C88'>Authenticator App</text>
  </g>
  <text x='25' y='220' font-size='18' fill='#411C56'>Next</text>
  <text x='200' y='220' font-size='18' fill='#411C56'>Skip</text>
</svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: The setup wizard should have at least three steps, each with a specific set of options and requirements.
The user should be able to add and manage authentication methods such as SMS, email, and authenticator apps.
The wizard should guide the user through a series of steps, each with a specific set of options and requirements.

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: Multi-Factor Authentication Setup Wizard

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, form logic, active selections, and handlers.
Review code cleaness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
